title: vicia tenuifolia subsp. elegans
intro: Vicia tenuifolia subsp. elegans, also known as the slender vetch or elegant vetch, is a perennial plant of the legume family native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various ailments. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Vicia tenuifolia subsp. elegans is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
